prestazioni: AMG M297 7.3L V12 (engine code: M120) forced-induction upgrade via twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbos with 68mm compressor wheels, custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipes, and a Motec M190 ECU recalibration for 950+ hp on 98 RON fuel, retaining the original dry-sump lubrication system but with an added Peterson Fluid Systems external oil cooler and a custom billet aluminum oil pan with integrated baffles for high-G stability

Full titanium exhaust system by Capristo, featuring 3.5-inch diameter Inconel 625 tubing, 4-into-1 merge collectors, and electronically actuated bypass valves for backpressure optimization, paired with a secondary catalytic converter delete (replaced with straight-pipe sections) and a custom X-pipe resonator for enhanced scavenging and a 1,200Hz exhaust note

Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the Cinque Roadster’s carbon-titanium monocoque, and spherical bearing top mounts by Radikal Performance, paired with a Pagani-specific front sway bar upgrade (24mm hollow chromoly) and a rear sway bar delete (replaced with a carbon fiber torque arm brace by Novitec for chassis rigidity)
estetica: Full carbon fiber aero package by Pagani’s in-house division, including a revised Cinque-spec front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed from carbon fiber-reinforced nylon for weight savings), a rear diffuser with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via a cockpit switch), and a fixed rear wing with a 1,200mm span and a NACA duct-fed central brake cooling channel

Custom 20-inch front / 21-inch rear forged magnesium wheels by APP Tech, featuring a 9.5x20 ET25 front and 13x21 ET40 rear staggered setup, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (255/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear), with titanium wheel bolts by HRE Performance and a central-locking system adapted from the Zonda R

Interior retrim by Saddleback Leather, featuring a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with exposed carbon fiber weave (3K twill), a custom titanium shift knob by BBI Offsets (machined from aerospace-grade 6AL-4V titanium), and a bespoke roll bar cover upholstered in quilted Italian leather with integrated LED ambient lighting by Diode Dynamics
